body:
## What & why

Adds a single, evidence-backed decision file:
**`docs/ops/OFFICIAL_PRIVATE_LAUNCH_DECISION.md`**.

The repo's real bottleneck isn't "build more" — it's **decide + consolidate**.
There are **50 open draft PRs**, none merged, and `main` is still at #559
(`7bd43c3`). This PR adds **one** file (no code, no competing `CLAUDE.md`/workflow),
records **real** gate results, and recommends collapsing the 50 PRs to a minimal RC set.

> **Guardrails honored:** this PR merges nothing, **closes nothing**, performs no
> external action, charges no one, exposes no secret, and disables no guard. The
> triage below is a **recommendation only** — every close/merge stays the founder's call.

## ⚠️ Expected CI state (read first)

This branch is cut from `main` @ `7bd43c3`, whose CI is **already red**: the
doctrine-guard battery (`test_landing_forbidden_claims`, `test_no_linkedin_scraper_string_anywhere`,
`test_v7_secret_leakage_guard`) fails on `main` and is what **#650 fixes**. A
**docs-only** PR cannot turn those green without duplicating #650's changes (which
would re-create the sprawl this PR argues against). **Correct sequence:** merge **#650**
first → `main` goes green → rebase this PR → its checks clear. Until then, a red
"Python quality, tests, readiness" job here is **inherited, not introduced**.

## Verdict

| Decision | Verdict |
|---|---|
| **Private Launch** (warm intros · paid diagnostic · 499 Command Sprint · manual/test payment · draft-only) | **GO — conditional** |
| **Public / Paid-beta / Live charge** | **NO-GO** (needs ≥1 signed+paid+delivered customer + Moyasar live, founder) |

Aligned to the codified truth labels in `docs/phase-e/00_GO_NO_GO.md` (which **pass**).

## Real gate evidence (run 2026-06-07 on `main` @ `7bd43c3`)

| Gate | Result |
|---|---|
| `make env-check` | ✅ PASS |
| alembic single head | ✅ PASS (013) |
| `make api-contract-check` | ✅ PASS (no committed baseline to diff) |
| `scripts/smoke_inprocess.py` | ✅ PASS — `/health` → 200 |
| `pytest tests/test_truth_labels_v11.py` | ✅ PASS |
| doctrine-guard battery | ❌ 4 fail on `main` → **fixed by #650** (allowlist-only) |
| `make security-smoke` / `make doctor` | ❌ FAIL — **separate gap, NOT fixed by #650** (3 tracked `.env.*.example` + ~16 fixture/doc token lines) |

Honest note: **#650 greens the doctrine guards but not `make doctor`** — fix that gap
in the RC (don't weaken the gate). Details in the doc §2/§2.A.

## Release-candidate recommendation

**ONE code RC (#650) + ONE Claude-wiring RC (#640) + this decision PR.** Not a wave of merges.

### 🟢 KEEP
| PR | Role |
|---|---|
| **#650** | Code RC — doctrine-guard fixes (no guard disabled) + canonical `/health`. Add the §2.A/§2.B fixes onto it before flipping CI green. |
| **#640** | Claude-wiring RC — lean `CLAUDE.md` (defers to existing `AGENTS.md`) + `claude-code.yml` with minimal permissions. |

### 🟡 SALVAGE reusable CI/dep fixes, then close
`#636` (pyproject↔requirements divergence — matches a real gap we hit) ·
`#630` (Trivy pin + Gitleaks license) · `#616` (official-launch gate + CI hardening) ·
`#600` (CI green baseline) · `#598` (repair Gitleaks/Trivy workflow).

### 🔴 CLOSE as exact duplicate
`#638` — same two files as #640, ~85 KB heavier; #640 is cleaner since `AGENTS.md` already exists on `main`.

### ⚪ SUPERSEDE (overlapping historical launch / OS / Wave / GTM / growth / brand drafts → close with reason)
- **Launch / Wave / first-revenue:** `#649 #648 #646 #645 #644 #643 #642 #641 #639 #637`
- **Company-OS foundation / scaffolding:** `#634 #633 #632 #629 #623 #615 #614 #613 #612 #611 #601 #599`
- **Launch / brand / positioning / website:** `#628 #625 #624 #619 #618 #617 #610 #609 #608 #607 #606 #605 #604 #603 #602`
- **GTM / targeting:** `#622 #621 #620`
- **Growth / distribution:** `#627 #626`

(Their durable assets are already on `main` or captured by #650/#640. Duplicate pairs to note: #607≈#608, #604≈#605.)

## Founder-only next steps (already documented — execute, don't duplicate)
Production secrets (`PRODUCTION_SECRETS_CHECKLIST.md`) · DNS/TLS (`GO_LIVE_INDEX.md`) ·
Moyasar KYC→live (`scripts/moyasar_live_cutover.py`) · `main` branch protection (doc §5) ·
warm-list fill (drafts only) · first paid customer (the 499 Command Sprint).

---
🤖 Decision pack generated by an automated launch review (read-only). See the committed
doc for full bilingual detail and the exact commands run.

commits.messageBody:
Add docs/ops/OFFICIAL_PRIVATE_LAUNCH_DECISION.md — an evidence-backed
GO/NO-GO for Dealix's private launch, aligned to the codified truth labels
in docs/phase-e/00_GO_NO_GO.md.

- Private Launch: GO (conditional); Public / paid-beta / live-charge: NO-GO.
- Records REAL gate results on main @ 7bd43c3: env-check PASS, alembic
  single-head PASS, api-contract PASS, in-process /health 200, truth-labels
  PASS; the doctrine-guard battery fails on main and is fixed by #650
  (allowlist-only, no guard disabled); make doctor/security-smoke has a
  separate gap (3 tracked .env.*.example files + fixture token lines) NOT
  covered by #650.
- Recommends ONE code RC (#650) + ONE Claude-wiring RC (#640), closing #638
  as a duplicate and superseding the other launch drafts (recommendation only).
- Documents founder-only blockers, the main branch-protection ruleset,
  rollback, and the 499 Command Sprint first-revenue path.

No code changed, no PR merged/closed, no external action, no secret exposed,
no guard disabled.
commits.messageHeadline: docs(ops): official private-launch decision + RC consolidation

title: docs(ops): official private-launch decision + 50-PR consolidation triage
